meta.title: AI Dev 25 | Bryan Catanzaro & Aleksandr Patrushev: Accelerating AI Development
meta.description:
As AI applications become more complex, choosing the right infrastructure for training, hosting, and inference is critical.

In this session from AI Dev 25, Bryan Catanzaro (VP of Applied Deep Learning Research, NVIDIA) and Aleksandr Patrushev (Head of Product, Nebius) explore the range of deployment strategies available to developers today.

They share insights on how to reduce total cost of ownership while accelerating development—from optimizing training workflows to choosing cost-efficient hosting and inference solutions.

A practical session for developers, engineers, and product teams working to scale AI applications effectively.
